chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1235 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.4810/2023 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of CMA No.4811/2023 (C/A) 16.08.2023 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner/applicant. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Sawan Khan Jagirani, Advocate files power on behalf of alleged contemnors No.3 & 4, who are also present in person; he also files objections to the listed contempt application on behalf of alleged contemnors, which are taken on record. Learned Counsel for the petitioner/applicant, under instructions, does not press instant contempt application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
